## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to introduce the GrowthX team to Imubit and discuss collaboration for expanding Imubit's market presence.](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team structure: David Capone (Managing Director, absent), Kyle Gaudreau (Sales), Mariana Montezzana (Managing Editor), Fatima Tahir (Content Manager)](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Imubit aims to expand into new verticals in 2025-2026, requiring strategic content and marketing support](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Focus on holistic marketing approach, not just lead generation, to drive Imubit's growth across multiple sectors](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Kyle Gaudreau: 19 years in growth, now in sales at GrowthX, based in Oakland](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Mariana Montezzana: Managing Editor, extensive experience in content, SEO, paid media, and product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Fatima Tahir: Content Manager, experienced in SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Tim Yandel: Recently joined Imubit (2 months ago) as VP of Growth, partnering with Rebecca on go-to-market activities](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Rebecca Murtagh: With Imubit for nearly 2 years (joining July 2023), leading marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### GrowthX Team Structure and Roles

  - [David Capone: Managing Director (absent), 20 years in SEO, former lead SE at Fanatics, TripAdvisor](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Kyle: Covering for David, helping with strategy and long-term planning](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Mariana: Day-to-day communication, content delivery, quality assurance, and schedule management](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Fatima: Meeting content requirements and generation](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Collaborative approach to strategy formation and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Imubit's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Successfully refined and targeted global market](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need to expand into other verticals in 2025-2026](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Seeking partner for:](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
    1.  Driving air cover and thought leadership across new verticals
    2.  Discovering similarities between personas
    3.  Developing a holistic marketing approach for growth

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up with David Capone to brief him on meeting outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review Imubit's current marketing strategies and vertical expansion plans](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Develop initial content strategy aligned with Imubit's goals for new vertical expansion](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Set up regular communication channels (Slack) between GrowthX and Imubit teams](https://fathom.video/share/QCMH9hEhTvpMABCtdUx5pj2sBLXZd41g?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
